aligned_lyrics.text: Hey, it’s him again: anh4gs, a scient
ist. He doesn’t remember the last time
he wrote futile things, but today he
suddenly itches to write again
He often jokes with himself that in the
future, if he no longer writes code, he
will become a writer to write about his
life, the people he met, and the roads
he traveled
Lately, he has been working out quite
regularly, which has given him a strong
physique: broad chest, toned glutes,
and a firm abdomen. The target is 70 k
ilograms, with only 6.9 kg left to go
He always tells himself that the abdomen
is the most important part of the body:
a strong core is necessary to bear the
weight of the upper half and serves as
the bridge for the body to perform
complex, high-paced movements. There
fore, he prioritizes core workouts: tra
ining them more than other areas.
Currently, his abs have 2 packs, and
soon they will be 6 packs
Recently, he has managed his emotions
better: he no longer holds grudges or
hates anyone. Probably because lately
he has been listening to self-cultiv
ation teachings. He doesn’t know if he
will reach enlightenment, but life has
become slightly gentler with him
He lives a leisurely life: morning
coffee at 6:50am, and returning to his
desk at 8:10am. He works, eats, and
rests reasonably, or at least he thinks
so. He often drinks orange juice in the
morning, which keeps him healthy. Occas
ionally he still eats onion porridge,
but this time it is because he wants to
He lives, works, and makes money to
realize his ambition: to step honorably
on the path of socialism. He does not
know if the road is far and long, but
he simply walks, without a shred of
doubt or calculation
